'''Daltarra''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Pakuuni sector/Legends|Pakuuni sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

Early in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the planet served as a listening outpost for the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] monitoring [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial fleet]] movements. The Rebel activity on the planet was discovered and eliminated by [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] and a group of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Storm commando/Legends|Storm commandos]] prior to the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].
